immutability: Skills CLI installation uses owner/repo plus skill name; this lock verifies reviewed package/skill/source metadata but does not pin upstream commits.

entries.name: dependency-upgrade
entries.installCommand: npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill dependency-upgrade --agent codex --yes --global

entries.name: gh-fix-ci
entries.installCommand: npx skills add openai/skills --skill gh-fix-ci --agent codex --yes --global
